programme.title: Merlin and the Book of Beasts
programme.desc: King Arthur is gone. The Round Table is in ruins. And a rogue sorcerer has unleashed a monstrous terror.

programme.title: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: Jesse and Leslie are schoolmates who create an imaginary world of monsters, trolls, ogres, and giants.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: A recent immigrant to America falls prey to a charming but wicked man who forces her into prostitution.

programme.title: The Good Guy
programme.desc: An ambitious woman thinks she has finally found her Mr. Right. So why is she drawn to his hapless colleague?

programme.title: I Give It a Year
programme.desc: A look at the trials and tribulations of a newlywed couple during their first year of marriage

programme.title: Dot the I
programme.desc: Young lovers in London are wrapped up in a love triangle that may not be exactly what it seems.

programme.title: Elegy
programme.desc: A student engages in a torrid affair with her professor and then returns years later with a revelation.

programme.title: The Longshots
programme.desc: The true story of Jasmine Plummer, the first female to play Pop Warner football, coached by her uncle.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: Amidst a sea of litigation, two New York City divorce lawyers find love.

programme.title: Witless Protection
programme.desc: When a small-town sheriff witnesses an attempted kidnapping, he tries to save the beautiful damsel in distress

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: A war vet's idea of after-school activities for his 12-year-old neighbor include race tracks and strip clubs.

programme.title: Magic in the Moonlight
programme.desc: An Englishman is brought in to help unmask a possible swindle. Personal and professional complications ensue.

programme.title: Home Again
programme.desc: Following her separation, Alice decides to start over by moving back to her hometown of Los Angeles.

programme.title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Kate Reddy manages the ultimate balancing act between work and her adoring family.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
